---
title: "Classifications"
title-block-banner: false
resources:
  - files/cno-sispe-8d-hi.json
---

## CNO-SISPE

<div id="search-wrap" style="display:flex; gap:8px; margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <input type="text" id="search" placeholder="Search" 
       oninput="filterTree(this.value)" 
       style="flex:1; padding:6px 10px; border:0.5px solid var(--bs-border-color); border-radius:6px; font: inherit; background: var(--bs-body-bg); color: var(--bs-body-color);" />
  <button onclick="document.getElementById('search').value=''; filterTree('');">Clean</button>
</div>
<div id="count-label" style="font-size:12px; margin-bottom:0.5rem;"></div>
<div id="tree"></div>
<script>
function getThemeColors() {
  const s = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
  const get = v => s.getPropertyValue(v).trim();
  return {
    bg: [get("--bs-purple") || "#7952b3",
         get("--bs-teal")   || "#20c997",
         get("--bs-info")   || "#0dcaf0",
         get("--bs-warning")|| "#ffc107",
         get("--bs-danger") || "#dc3545"],
    border: get("--bs-border-color") || "#dee2e6"
  };
}

function hexToRgba(hex, alpha) {
  const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16);
  const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16);
  const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${alpha})`;
}

function buildNode(item, level, colors) {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.style.margin = "2px 0";
  div.dataset.code = item.code;
  div.dataset.name = item.name.toLowerCase();
  const row = document.createElement("div");
  row.style.cssText = "display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:5px 8px; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer;";
  row.onmouseover = () => row.style.background = "rgba(128,128,128,0.15)";
  row.onmouseout  = () => row.style.background = "";
  const accent = colors.bg[(level - 1) % colors.bg.length];
  const code = document.createElement("span");
  code.textContent = item.code;
  code.style.cssText = `font-size:0.8em; padding:1px 6px; border-radius:4px; flex-shrink:0; background:${hexToRgba(accent, 0.15)}; color:${accent};`;
  const name = document.createElement("span");
  name.textContent = item.name;
  name.style.fontWeight = level === 1 ? "500" : "400";
  row.appendChild(code); row.appendChild(name);
  div.appendChild(row);
  if (item.children && item.children.length > 0) {
    const children = document.createElement("div");
    children.style.cssText = `margin-left:20px; border-left:1.5px solid ${colors.border}; padding-left:12px; display:none;`;
    item.children.forEach(c => children.appendChild(buildNode(c, level + 1, colors)));
    div.appendChild(children);
    row.onclick = () => {
      const open = children.style.display === "none";
      children.style.display = open ? "" : "none";
    };
  }
  return div;
}

function renderTree(data) {
  const colors = getThemeColors();
  const container = document.getElementById("tree");
  container.innerHTML = "";
  data.forEach(item => container.appendChild(buildNode(item, 1, colors)));
  document.getElementById("count-label").textContent =
    document.querySelectorAll("#tree [data-code]").length + " occupations";
}

function filterTree(q) {
  q = q.toLowerCase().trim();
  const nodes = document.querySelectorAll("#tree [data-code]");
  if (!q) {
    nodes.forEach(n => n.style.display = "");
    document.querySelectorAll("#tree div > div:not([data-code])").forEach(c => {
      if (c.style.borderLeft) c.style.display = "none";
    });
    return;
  }
  nodes.forEach(n => {
    const match = n.dataset.code.includes(q) || n.dataset.name.includes(q);
    n.style.display = match ? "" : "none";
    if (match) {
      let p = n.parentElement;
      while (p && p.id !== "tree") {
        p.style.display = "";
        if (p.style.borderLeft) p.style.display = "";
        p = p.parentElement;
      }
    }
  });
}

fetch("files/cno-sispe-8d-hi.json")
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => renderTree(data))
  .catch(() => document.getElementById("tree").textContent = "Error al cargar el JSON.");

document.addEventListener("quarto-color-scheme-changed", () => {
  fetch("files/cno-sispe-8d-hi.json")
    .then(r => r.json())
    .then(data => renderTree(data));
});
</script>
